name: ihuus-neighborhood-intelligence
description: Neighborhood and Location Intelligence: walkability, school ratings, flood and fire risk, air quality, noise, demographics, and more for any CA/TX home, neighborhood, or address.
long_description:
Neighborhood due diligence for home buyers, real estate agents, and location researchers. Connect Claude to the iHuus Neighborhood Intelligence API and get instant answers about any CA/TX address.

Tools across 6 domains:
• Vibe: walkability, privacy, visual appeal, dog-friendliness, urban-rural character
• Environment: noise levels, industrial proximity, air quality
• Risk: FEMA flood zones, CALFIRE fire hazard severity
• Schools: K-12 ratings, district search, school profiles
• Demographics: insurance coverage, political lean, age profile
• Geospatial: address geocoding (used automatically by all tools)

Data availability: California and Texas. Fire risk covers California only.
Requires an iHuus API AI Pro plan — https://ihuus.com/pricing

api_key.title: iHuus API Key
api_key.description: Get yours on ihuus.com (requires API AI Pro Plan)
